$comment: Story scaffolding and update rules. All component docs live in Storybook. No standalone markdown component docs.

conditionalStories.perEnumValue: one story per meaningful enum variant
conditionalStories.accessibility: one story with explicit role and aria annotations

updateRules.addStory: new enum value or meaningful variant
updateRules.regenerate: API changed so substantially that patching is less clear

styleValidation.$comment: Run after scaffoldStory and updateStory. Checks generated output against storybook-style-guide.json.
checks: wrapperClass present on every prose-rendering template
all callout elements use registered calloutComponents classes
styleValidation.onViolation: flag with agent-note, do not block build
